name: Handle404Exception
description: Handles a 404 Not Found error by redirecting to the portal's defined 404 page or by returning a standard 404 response.

name: AppendFileModifiedDate
description: Appends a version number based on the file's last modified date to a relative path. Useful for cache-busting CSS and JS files.

name: GetRegionList
description: Gets a dictionary of regions for a given country code from a DNN list.

name: GetCountryCodeList
description: Gets a dictionary of all country codes and their names for a given portal.
signature: public static Dictionary<String, String> GetCountryCodeList(int portalId = -1)

name: GetCountryName
description: Gets the name of a country from its country code.
signature: public static string GetCountryName(string countryCode, int portalId = -1)

description: Gets the name of a region from a combined country and region code key.
signature: public static string GetRegionName(string countryRegionCodeKey, string dnnlistname = "Region")

name: GetCultureCodeNameList
description: Gets a dictionary of enabled culture codes and their native names for a portal.

name: GetAllCultureCodeNameList

signature: public static Dictionary<string, string> GetAllCultureCodeNameList()

description: Gets the display name for a given culture code.
signature: public static string GetCultureCodeName(string cultureCode)

name: GetCultureCodeList
description: Gets a list of enabled culture codes for a portal.
signature: public static List<string> GetCultureCodeList(int portalId = -1)

signature: public static List<string> GetPortalLanguageList(int portalId = -1)

description: Gets a dictionary of available currencies for a portal from the 'Currency' DNN list.
signature: public static Dictionary<string, string> GetCurrencyList(int portalId = -1)

name: GetAllCultureCodeList
description: Gets a list of SimplisityInfo objects representing all available .NET cultures, including display name, code, and a flag image URL.

name: GetLibraryVersion

name: CreateFolder

description: Gets a RoleInfo object for a role by its name.

name: GetResourceString

description: Decrypts a string using the portal's GUID as the default passkey.

signature: public static string BackUpNewFileName(string backupRootFolder, string moduleName, string fileAppendix = "BackUp.xml")

name: RecycleApplicationPool
description: Recycles a web site Application Pool (including the current web site). Requires to reference Microsoft.Web.Administration and System.Web.Hosting. IMPORTANT: The IIS user requires extended permissions to recycle application pool(s). Recycles the application pool by 'touching' the web.config file.
signature: public static bool RecycleApplicationPool(string siteName = null)

parameters.name: siteName
parameters.description: The site name: leave it NULL to recycle the current site's App Pool.

name: ParseQueryString
description: Gets a query parameter from a URL string.  This function parses the URL string to get the parameter. it assumes friendly URL format first and the uses HttpUtility.ParseQueryString(url.Query). Because friendly format may have a page the same name as a key, be careful with the name of query keys. Parses a URL to get a specific query parameter value, checking both friendly URL format and standard query string.
signature: public static string ParseQueryString(string key, string requesturl)
